_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Conduct vendor evaluations for data and AI platforms, including requirements definition, proof-of-concept design and execution, technical and commercial assessment, and selection recommendation.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. Task OP-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-008 (OP, cosine: 0.589), TF-T-006 (TF, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.595). Shared vocabulary: [vendor]. NICE-only terms [develop, procedures, review] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, commercial, concept, conduct, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.894, R=0.835). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Develop vendor review procedures" and "Conduct vendor evaluations for data and AI platforms, including requirements def" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.634 ≈ STS 0.595 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [vendor] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [vendor]. NICE-only: [develop, procedures, review]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, commercial, concept, conduct, data].
